race.comment: LIKE CLOCKWORK (3) missed narrowly two back before storming home impressively in the Guineas, finishing 3.6L off the winner. CJP hops back on board today and getting out to 2000m now looks a big tick. Can take closer order this time and land the knockout blow. EFFORTLESSLY (6) was too good over the mile last start when setting the tempo and that form has already been franked. She's trending the right way and while this is tougher, her recent figures say she's not out of this. Watch for her late in the race. LADIES PRO (1) was solid late in the Guineas and her breeding suggests getting out in trip should suit. Pike hopping back on board is a big push for her chances and she can return to winning ways. PONY UP (2) is better suited out to this trip now and can be in this for a long way. A SUMMER FLING (7) can raise the bar again now out to 2000m.
